fixes.replacement: FILE *f = fopen("secret.txt", "r"); if (f && fgets(dst, 80, f)) { size_t len = strlen(dst); if (len > 0 && dst[len-1] == '\n') dst[len-1] = '\0'; } if (f) fclose(f);

static_findings.message: This code uses a function that can write past the bounds of a buffer. Consider safer bounded alternatives such as fgets, snprintf, or explicit length checks.
